headline: Tesla sinks 7% despite strong deliveries
detail: Tesla dropping hard on good news means the market is in a punish-growth mood. That sentiment bleeds directly into your QQQ, SMH, and any high-multiple tech name. On margin, a sentiment-driven selloff can move faster than stops.
rec: No new buys triggered by this. Watch QQQ's $670 stop and SMH's $540 stop - if broad selling accelerates, those levels become real decisions. No action needed yet but stay alert.

headline: Palantir bounces as analyst cheers AI advantage
detail: Palantir bouncing on AI narrative is a mild positive for AI/tech sentiment broadly, which touches your QQQ and SMH holdings. It doesn't directly move your specific names but confirms AI stories can still catch bids.
rec: No action warranted - you don't hold PLTR and the bounce doesn't change anything in your current book. Just a sentiment data point that pure AI names can still get bought.

headline: Autonomous drone startup Quantum Systems raises $1.2B in defense
detail: Defense-tech funding surging signals institutional money rotating toward defense-AI crossover plays. This isn't direct to your holdings but confirms the AI investment wave is broadening away from pure semiconductors, worth watching for sector rotation out of chips.
rec: No action on your current holdings from this. If chip/semis keep underperforming, this signals where rotation is going - but don't chase it today, especially with SOXL and CRWD needing attention first.

headline: How to get ahead of the next AI investment wave
detail: Generic AI investment narrative piece - no specific catalyst here for your holdings. Your book is already heavily exposed to AI infrastructure via SOXL, SMH, CRWD so you have the exposure, the question is whether it's sized right given margin risk.
rec: No action - you're already concentrated in exactly these names. This headline adds no new information that changes a trade decision today.
